title: CAS Learning Record (one per line in learning.jsonl)
description: One JSON object per line. Recorded in Phase 7; always append after evaluation (confirmation or error-driven update).

update_type.description: confirmation_no_update when matched; otherwise one of the persistent update types

error_class.description: Null when matched; set when mismatched per spec §4.2

persistent_ref.description: Where the persistent change was made: STATE.json (policy/tool_model/belief/uncertainty id or field), or user_query

rationale.description: Short reason for the learning update

entry_id.description: Optional stable id (e.g. UUID) for this line; report can use entry_id_refs for audit under log compaction

run_nonce.description: Optional. From STATE.run_nonce or run_nonce.txt; required for live-evidence runs.
